sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58074" key="klw|oma/stic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῳομάστιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῑγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58074.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who is flogged with a collar on, Com. Adesp.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1039</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
